author: Vincent Voyer
subject: chore(dev): reload in dev now takes ~500ms (algolia/react-instantsearch#2000)
body:
Before this commit, the `yarn start` workflow took 10s, now it takes
500ms in average.

Optimization was done via:
- webpack 2 switch
- dev env uses simpler sourcemap strategy
- use happypack (https://github.com/amireh/happypack)
- Create a common chunks plugin (this reduces the size of downloaded
JavaScript files by a big factor).
